text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, at the training track...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I've been observing you, and based<n>on what
I've seen, your advice is not<n>only sound, but also
highly effective.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
As such, I shall honor you with the<n>special
privilege of giving me advice.<n>You have one
minute to tell me<n>something useful.
choice_data_list: But I'm in the middle of training too...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh? It's not often you get the<n>opportunity to
exchange words with<n>someone as illustrious as
me, you<n>know!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It would be rather foolish of you not to<n>take
advantage of such a chance.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It looks like she's not going to let me<n>go unless I
give her some kind of<n>advice, so I try to think of
something to<n>say.
choice_data_list:
What do you think of the saying "Where there's
a will, there's a way"?
Any thoughts on timing your strategy in a race?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh? What an intriguing question. I<n>must say, it
makes for a fine<n>discussion point.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, King Halo and I discuss the<n>topic for a
while.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I appreciate your subject of<n>choice. Timing is
critical when making<n>a final spurt in the
homestretch!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And it's that very skill that serves as<n>my ultimate
weapon! Allow me to tell<n>you all about it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, King Halo and I discuss the<n>topic for a
while.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Goodness, look at the time! I must be<n>going now.
